rationale: Anticipating the pivot one cycle ahead — a warm horizon SVG enters at the middle band as a quiet promise of the tahwil, and the background shifts from deep shadow toward warm parchment edges, the room beginning to widen before it arrives.

input.svg_markup: <svg viewBox="0 0 1000 300" preserveAspectRatio="none"><defs><linearGradient id="hz" x1="0" x2="0" y1="0" y2="1"><stop offset="0%" stop-color="#2a1f14" stop-opacity="0"/><stop offset="45%" stop-color="#c4894a" stop-opacity="0.55"/><stop offset="55%" stop-color="#e8d4a0" stop-opacity="0.78"/><stop offset="100%" stop-color="#2a1f14" stop-opacity="0"/></linearGradient></defs><rect x="0" y="100" width="1000" height="100" fill="url(#hz)"/><line x1="60" y1="150" x2="940" y2="150" stroke="#f5e6c8" stroke-width="1.4" opacity="0.85" stroke-linecap="round"/><line x1="180" y1="150" x2="820" y2="150" stroke="#e8d4a0" stroke-width="3" opacity="0.45" stroke-linecap="round"/></svg>
